_metadata.description: Deluge Firmware Parameter Database - extracted from source code
_metadata.extractionMethod: Static analysis of C++ source code
notes: User-facing values (0-50) are converted via getParamFromUserValue()
Patched params can be modulated via the mod matrix; unpatched cannot
UNPATCHED_SHARED params are common to both Sound and GlobalEffectable
UNPATCHED_GLOBAL params are only for Kit/Song level effects
Enum values are exact firmware values from definitions_cxx.hpp

Oscillator.description: Enable hard sync of oscillator 2 to oscillator 1
Synthesis mode for the sound engine

Filter.defaultValue: 2147483647 (max, fully open) for sample; varies for synth

Filter.description: Signal routing between LPF and HPF

Envelope.defaultValue: user value 50 for sample; 2147483647 (max) for synth

Global.description: Master pitch adjustment for the sound
Volume level post reverb send, used for sidechain ducking

Effect.description: Delay sync to tempo division (even values only shown; triplet and dotted also available)
Mod FX rate for global effectable (Kit/Song level)
Mod FX depth for global effectable (Kit/Song level)
Delay rate for global effectable (Kit/Song level)
Delay feedback for global effectable (Kit/Song level)
Sidechain compressor volume for global effectable

Arpeggiator.description: Note order pattern for the arpeggiator
Octave traversal pattern for the arpeggiator
Number of octaves the arpeggiator spans
Number of simultaneous notes in arp chords
Probability of glide between arp notes
Probability of ratchet on each note
